info.name: EsyDocs API - Complete Collection
info.description:
Complete API testing collection for EsyDocs backend services. Includes authentication, file upload, PDF conversion, organization, and optimization endpoints.

All endpoints return a standardized response format:
{
  "success": true/false,
  "message": "...",
  "data": { ... } or null,
  "error": { "code": "...", "details": "..." } or null,
  "meta": { "requestId": "...", "page": N, "limit": N } or null
}

For detailed API documentation, visit /docs on the running server.

exec: // Add X-Request-ID header to all requests

request.description: Check if the API Gateway is running
Create a new user account. Sets HTTP-only access_token cookie (8-hour lifetime).

response.name: 201 - User Created

request.description: Login with existing credentials. Returns user info and sets HTTP-only access_token cookie.
Get currently logged-in user information. Requires valid access_token cookie.

response.name: 200 - Current User

request.description: Get detailed user profile including phone and image.

response.name: 200 - User Profile

request.description: Refresh the access token. Requires a valid existing access_token cookie.
Logout and clear authentication cookie. Adds token to denylist for immediate revocation.
Initialize a chunked upload. Returns uploadId for subsequent chunk uploads.
Upload a file chunk. Use the 'file' body type and select your file.
Finalize the upload and make the file available for processing.
Check the status of an upload.
Convert Word document (.doc, .docx) to PDF using LibreOffice
Convert Excel spreadsheet (.xls, .xlsx) to PDF using LibreOffice
Convert PowerPoint (.ppt, .pptx) to PDF using LibreOffice
Convert HTML document (.html, .htm) to PDF using LibreOffice
Convert multiple images to single PDF (one image per page). Supports: .jpg, .png, .gif, .webp, .bmp
Check the status of a conversion job. Status: pending, processing, completed, failed
Download the converted PDF file
Delete a conversion job and its files
Get all jobs for word-to-pdf tool
Convert PDF to Word (.docx) using LibreOffice
Convert PDF to Excel (.xlsx) using LibreOffice
Convert PDF to PowerPoint (.pptx) using LibreOffice
Convert PDF pages to PNG images (returns ZIP file) using pdftoppm
Convert PDF to HTML with images (returns ZIP file) using pdftohtml
Extract plain text from PDF (.txt) using pdftotext
Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b archival format using Ghostscript
Check the status of a PDF conversion job
Download the converted file
Delete a conversion job and its files
Get all jobs for pdf-to-word tool
Merge multiple PDFs into a single document using pdfcpu
Split PDF into individual pages or ranges (returns ZIP file). Range format: "1-3,5,7-9" or "all"
Remove specified pages from PDF. Format: "2,4,6" or "2-5"
Extract specified pages into a new PDF. Format: "1,3,5-7"
Reorder pages in PDF according to specified order. Format: "3,1,2,4"
Convert images to PDF with optional OCR (requires Tesseract)
Check the status of an organization job
Download the organized PDF file
Delete an organization job and its files
Get all jobs for merge-pdf tool
Compress PDF to reduce file size. Quality options: screen (72dpi), ebook (150dpi), printer (300dpi), prepress (high quality)
Fix corrupted or damaged PDFs using Ghostscript to rebuild the PDF structure
Add searchable text layer to scanned PDFs using Tesseract OCR. Options: language (default: eng), dpi (default: 300)
Check the status of an optimization job
Download the optimized PDF file
Delete an optimization job and its files
Get all jobs for compress-pdf tool
Get the authenticated user's job history across all tools and services. Requires valid authentication.
